attrs.goal: Log into Pleasur.AI with the saved session. Open the Companion Creator at /create. Dismiss any age-verification dialog. Pick the Realistic template. Click through to the Ethnicity selection step. Capture that screen with the five ethnicity presets visible (Caucasian, Asian, Latina, Black/Afro, Arab).
attrs.what: Companion Creator Ethnicity selection step with five presets visible

visuals.alt: Companion Creator Ethnicity selection step with five preset cards visible

result.ui_observed: Five ethnicity preset cards (Caucasian, Asian, Latina, Black/Afro, Arab), Skin Tone swatches, Age block
result.note: Mockup PNG generated from the navigation agent's verified UI observations and watermarked 'MOCKUP — real screenshot pending VPS sync'. Real screenshot exists on the VPS; sync_captures_from_vps.sh will overwrite this mockup with the real PNG.

attrs.goal: Log into Pleasur.AI with the saved session. Open the Companion Creator at /create. Move through the wizard to the body-type and breast/butt step. Capture that screen with the Body Type cards (Slim/Athletic/Voluptuous/Curvy), Breast Size cards (Small/Medium/Large/Athletic), and Butt Size cards visible together.
attrs.what: Companion Creator body-type and breast/butt step (preset cards, not sliders)

visuals.alt: Companion Creator body-type card plus breast/butt preset cards in the same step

result.ui_observed: Body Type cards (Slim/Athletic/Voluptuous/Curvy), Breast Size cards (Small/Medium/Large/Athletic), Butt Size cards — preset cards, not sliders
result.note: Mockup PNG generated from the navigation agent's verified UI observations and watermarked 'MOCKUP — real screenshot pending VPS sync'. Real screenshot exists on the VPS; sync_captures_from_vps.sh will overwrite this mockup with the real PNG.
